audit_items.proof_trace: The only inline function body in timeout_manager_impl.h is calc_expiration (L60-63), which exclusively performs integer arithmetic on scalar member fields (_last_ticks, _rectify_ticks) and a value-type return from time_duration_milliseconds(interval).ticks() — no pointer dereferences exist. Pointer dereferences on Callback* occur in the .cc implementation, where all callers supply non-null closures via NewPermanentExtClosure/NewExtClosure factory functions (C++ new throws on failure), and no external path can inject a null callback into the _timeouts container.
